title: VideoStreamHealthPayload
description: Payload for video_stream_health events emitted periodically (every 10 s) while the streamer is running

fps_recent.description: Observed frames per second over the most recent status interval

client_count.description: Number of currently connected streaming clients

frame_drop_total.description: Cumulative count of failed client frame sends since streamer start

uptime_seconds.description: Seconds elapsed since the streamer started

interval_seconds.description: Length of the observation window for fps_recent (typically 10 s)
